---
title: "Meet the Group"
listing:
  - id: pi
    include: 
      people_group: "pi"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: researcher
    include: 
      people_group: "researcher"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  # - id: undergraduate
  #   include:
  #     people_group: "undergraduate"
  #   exclude:
  #     external: true
  #   template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
  #   sort: last
  #   type: grid
  #   fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: gradstudent
    include: 
      people_group: "gradstudent"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: post-bac
    include: 
      people_group: "post-bac"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: past-members
    include: 
      people_group: "alumni"
    exclude:
      external: true
    template: ../_ejs/alumni-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, education, altsubtitle, alteducation]
page-layout: full
---


## Principal Investigator


::: {#pi}
:::


:::{.sand-background}
## Research Scientists



::: {#researcher}
:::

:::

<!-- ## Undergraduate Research Assistants

::: {#undergraduate}
::: -->

:::{.sand-background}
## Graduate Students



::: {#gradstudent}
:::

:::

<!-- ## Post Baccalaureate Researchers

::: {#post-bac}
::: -->

:::{.sand-background}
## Past Members



::: {#past-members}
:::

:::
